q1.content: To start, could you tell me a bit about yourself and how technology has played a role in your life — either professionally or personally?
q1.requirement: Learn about the person's general background and their relationship with technology. Understand how central technology is to their daily life and work.

q2.content: Can you think of a specific moment when a piece of technology — a tool, a device, or an application — significantly changed the way you work or think about something?
q2.requirement: Understand a concrete turning point or memorable experience the person has had with technology. Get specific details about what changed and why it mattered to them.

q3.content: On the flip side, is there a time when technology frustrated or let you down in a meaningful way?
q3.requirement: Learn about a negative or frustrating experience with technology to get a balanced view of the person's relationship with it.
